name: ToolhouseAgent
description: Structure of a Toolhouse AI agent object returned from the Platform API.

fields.name: agentId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the agent.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the agent.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the agent's purpose.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: URL-friendly identifier for the agent (vanity slug).

fields.name: model
fields.description: The LLM model identifier used by the agent (e.g., gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet).

fields.name: systemPrompt
fields.description: System prompt defining the agent's behavior and personality.

fields.name: isPublic
fields.description: Whether the agent is publicly accessible without authentication.

fields.name: tools
fields.description: List of Toolhouse tool identifiers attached to this agent.

fields.name: bundles
fields.description: List of tool bundle identifiers attached to this agent.

fields.name: files
fields.description: Files attached to this agent for RAG or context.

fields.name: schedules
fields.description: Cron schedules configured for autonomous agent execution.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the agent was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the agent was last modified.

fields.name: fileId
fields.description: File identifier.

fields.name: name
fields.description: File name.

fields.name: url
fields.description: File URL or storage reference.

fields.name: position
fields.description: Ordering position of the file.

fields.name: scheduleId
fields.description: Schedule identifier.

fields.name: cronExpression
fields.description: Cron expression (e.g., '0 9 * * 1-5').

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Whether the schedule is currently active.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: When the schedule was created.

fields.name: runId
fields.description: Unique run identifier.

fields.name: agentId
fields.description: The agent that executed this run.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Execution status.

fields.name: logs
fields.description: Execution log entries.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: When the run started.
